ops.title: repo-bootstrap: pre-commit config becomes rendered artifact
ops.description: Delete templates/{python,go,swift}/pre-commit-config.yaml; add templates/<lang>/claude/fragments/pre-commit-config.yaml/layout.toml importing cc-skills:precommit-base + language fragment; manifest.py FileSpec dests → .claude/fragments/.pre-commit-config.yaml/layout.toml (swift-app keeps pointing at swift template); test updates; SKILL.md/reference doc updates. Requires yaml fragments on cc-skills@main.

ops.text: uv run pytest green in plugins/repo-bootstrap
scratch scaffold per layer renders .pre-commit-config.yaml matching base+language fragments and uvx prek prepare-hooks passes
